# Minutes Schema

Full structure for meeting-minutes output. Required top-level sections:

- **Metadata** — title, date, time, location, facilitator, notetaker
- **Attendance** — present, absent, optional
- **Decisions** — decision + rationale (one block per decision)
- **Action items** — owner + due date + acceptance criteria
- **Parking lot** — unresolved items deferred to a follow-up

Keep it under one page for 30-minute meetings, two pages for 60-minute meetings. Use plain language and bullets; label uncertain items `TBD`; no speculation or personal opinions; link to artifacts when available.
